title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released the TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, specialized ASICs served through the Virgo Network. The video compares these domain-specific processors against NVIDIA general-purpose GPUs and analyzes scaling strategies (up and out) in the context of LLM deployment economics.
